title: osteospermum rotundifolium
intro: Osteospermum rotundifolium, also known as a Blue Eyed Daisy, is a flowering plant species native to South Africa. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Osteospermum rotundifolium include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues, as well as providing antioxidant protection against cell damage. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support immune function and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
